ddls:
CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population of the continent (latest available data) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the continent (latest available data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent the country belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population of the country (latest available data) */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the country (latest available data) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary data source for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator the data point represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected from the source */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last verified for accuracy and reliability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last synchronized from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data point */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data point */,
  "validity" REAL /* Validity of the data point */,
  "timeliness" REAL /* Timeliness of the data point */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)
